title: Howmet Aerospace Inc. (HWM) CEO John Plant on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Howmet Aerospace Inc. (HWM) CEO John Plant on Q4 2021 Results - Earnings Call Transcript

title: Howmet Aerospace Q4 Bottom-Line Beats Consensus; Sees Accelerating Revenue Growth Through 2022
text: Howmet Aerospace Inc HWM reported fourth-quarter revenue growth of 3.8% year-over-year to $1.29 billion, missing the consensus of $1.31 billion. Segment sales: Engine Products $605 million (+9% Y/Y), Fastening Systems $256 million (-3% Y/Y), Engineered Structures $190 million (-12% Y/Y) and Forged Wheels $234 million (+15% Y/Y).

title: Howmet (HWM) Tops Q4 Earnings Estimates, Gives Solid View
text: Howmet's (HWM) Q4 earnings reflect the impacts of strength in the commercial transportation and aerospace markets, weakness in defense aerospace, and high costs. It predicts 2022 earnings growth.

title: Howmet (HWM) Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates
text: Howmet (HWM) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 3.45% and 2.32%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Industrial Stocks Earnings Due on Feb 2: EMR, ROP & More
text: Industrial's October-December earnings are likely to reflect the impacts of improved economic activities, cost inflation and supply-chain issues. Releases by EMR, ROP, AVY & HWM are worth a look.
